ns1:revision.ns1:text:
'''Server support for kernels: '''
*RHEL 7.6 (3.10.0-957.el7) '''Client support for unpatched kernels: '''
*RHEL 6.10 (2.6.32-754.6.3.el6) *RHEL 7.6 (3.10.0-957.el7) *SLES12 SP3 (4.4.155-94.50) *Ubuntu 16.04 (4.4.0-131) '''Recommended e2fsprogs version: '''
*v1.42.13.wc6 '''Interoperability Support: '''
*Clients & Servers: Latest 2.9.X == Issues fixed between 2.10.5 and 2.10.6 == ''' Bug ''' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-1895 LU-1895]: Failover Test failure on test suite mmp, subtest test_5 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-7988 LU-7988]: HSM: high lock contention for cdt_llog_lock *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-8200 LU-8200]: sanityn test_33c: FAIL: Sync-Lock-Cancel not triggered *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9273 LU-9273]: replay-ost-single test_5: timeout after ost failover *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9372 LU-9372]: OOM happens on OSS during Lustre recovery for more than 5000 clients *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9664 LU-9664]: sanity-hsm test_9a: @@@@@@ FAIL: mds4 CDT state is not 'disabled' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9887 LU-9887]: sanity-lfsck test_9a: FAIL: (4) Got speed 952, expected less than 144 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9983 LU-9983]: LBUG llog_osd.c:327:llog_osd_declare_write_rec() - all DNE MDS *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10055 LU-10055]: mds_fill_lvbo() message spew on MDS console *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10157 LU-10157]: LNET_MAX_IOV hard coded to 256 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10174 LU-10174]: Lustre master (pre-2.11) fails to build against ZFS 0.6.5.7 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10394 LU-10394]: IB_MR_TYPE_SG_GAPS mlx5 LNet performance drop *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10459 LU-10459]: LBUG o2iblnd_cb.c:991:kiblnd_check_sends_locked()) ASSERTION( conn->ibc_nsends_posted <= conn->ibc_queue_depth ) failed: *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10505 LU-10505]: sanity test_56w: '/usr/bin/lfs getstripe -c /mnt/lustre/d56w.sanityw/file1 wrong: found 7, expected 6 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10560 LU-10560]: Fixes for 4.14 kernel *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10575 LU-10575]: No mdsrate on Ubuntu client *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10579 LU-10579]: chlg: -1(null) changelog for setfattr on trusted.* *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10584 LU-10584]: Interop 2.10.2 <-> 2.11 sanityn test_51d: FAIL: rss before: 1024, after 1024, some pages remained *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10603 LU-10603]: ptlrpc_lprocfs_req_buffers_max_fops unused *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10803 LU-10803]: req_buffers_max and req_history_max setting problems *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-10985 LU-10985]: Attempting to send a mkdir create intents crashes server *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11068 LU-11068]: "not a valid identifier" in lbuild caused by an extra space *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11125 LU-11125]: ofd_create_hdl() destroys_in_progress already cleared *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11160 LU-11160]: build: implicit dependency on libuuid-devel *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11186 LU-11186]: Cannot create files on MDT1, ofd_precreate_objects()) snx11205-OST0001:0xffffffdd:11811161088 hit the OBIF_MAX_OID (1<<32)! *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11187 LU-11187]: MMP updated sometimes failes T10PI checks *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11195 LU-11195]: LBUG: (lod_lov.c:633:lod_free_comp_buffer()) ASSERTION( entry->llc_stripe == ((void *)0) ) *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11201 LU-11201]: NMI watchdog: BUG: soft lockup in lfsck_namespace *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11215 LU-11215]: conf-sanity test_61: Invalid filesystem option set: large_xattr *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11227 LU-11227]: client process hangs when lod_sync accesses deactivated OSTs *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11254 LU-11254]: kernel update [RHEL6.10 2.6.32-754.3.5.el6] *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11255 LU-11255]: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.143-94.47.1] *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11412 LU-11412]: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.155-94.50.1] *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11424 LU-11424]: incorrect amount of cpts copied to lnet_cpts *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11448 LU-11448]: kernel update [RHEL7.5 3.10.0-862.14.4.el7] *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11500 LU-11500]: kernel update [RHEL6.10 2.6.32-754.6.3.el6] *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11525 LU-11525]: support for RHEL 7.6 *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11563 LU-11563]: 99-lustre.rules on clients tries to execute non-existent /usr/sbin/l_tunedisk *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-11663 LU-11663]: corrupt data after page-unaligned write with zfs backend lustre 2.10 ''' Question/Request ''' *[https://jira.whamcloud.com/browse/LU-9160 LU-9160]: Very slow mount of 300TB+ ldiskfs volume [[Category:Releases]]
